title: ModernShowcase
description: Advanced glass showcase, display anything with custom angles and extreme lightweight performance.
body:
![Modernshowcase showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGohPDy6/images/06db1f3b2b33dafdd2d7ad8a3ce2a5937b8a3297.gif)
> ModernShowcase offers a glass showcase similar to an item frame, but with customizable scale size, rotation, and auto-rotation features. It leverages "Display Item" to showcase items efficiently and utilizes "PersistentDataContainer" to save showcase data to the chunk of the World.

## Features
To acquire a Glass Showcase, assemble 8 glass blocks (any type is acceptable) and 1 item frame.
Once placed, right-click to preview the items in the showcase.
Shift + Right-click to access the showcase settings.
![Crafting a Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tGohPDy6/images/5f399276de4f9e21f6637a83a42ffd01b4a4039a.gif)
### Current settings options:
- Scale Size: 1~10 (default 7)
- Toggle Fixed Display: Whether the display item always faces the player.
- Toggle Glass Display: The visibility of the glass case.
- Set Display Items: Change the items in the showcase.
- Position Offest: Change the offest of items in the showcase.
- Yaw/Pitch Direction: Specifies the direction of the displayed item.
- Auto Rotation Speed: -02 ~ 25(default 0).

## Permissions
- modernshowcase.craft - whether player can craft item showcase.
- modernshowcase.place - whether player can place item showcase.
- modernshowcase.edit  - whether place can edit item showcase.

## Support

You can get support, make suggestions or report a bug through the [Discussion tab](https://www.spigotmc.org/threads/modernshowcase-360%EF%BE%9F-display-extreme-performance-folia-support-open-source.635785/) or on our [Discord Server ](https://discord.gg/9c287zPpUZ). If you find this plugin helpful, please consider leaving a review.
